sn43.11:1.1: … "And what, bhikkhus, is the path leading to the unconditioned? The Noble Eightfold Path: this is called the path leading to the unconditioned.
sn43.11:1.2: "Thus, bhikkhus, I have taught you the unconditioned and the path leading to the unconditioned … . This is our instruction to you." sn.iv.362
